query:
SELECT
                id::uuid as "id!",
                source as "source!",
                event_type as "event_type!",
                ts_coided as "ts_coided!: Timestamp",
                payload as "payload!"
            FROM core.events
            WHERE payload IS NULL OR payload = 'null'::jsonb OR payload = '{}'::jsonb
            ORDER BY ts_coided DESC
            LIMIT $1
